title: Your Favorite Yoni
wikitext:
[]: Your Favorite Yoni             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sat Mar 26, 2011 10:22 am [I adjusted the topic title for pedantic accuracy, since references to vaginae tend to involve ones to female reproductive anatomy in general. -Reichu] Got the idea from FreakyFilmFan4ever in the your favorite phallus topic. I got none, but I bet reichu will be able to make our minds more scarred...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 26, 2011 10:32 am Lilith's Forehead Third Eye/Vagina HANDS DOWN

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Mar 26, 2011 10:32 am It was just a matter of time, I suppose. Lillith's third eye is the clear victor for me. But in general, I just prefer phalluses to yonis. What does that say about me?

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sat Mar 26, 2011 10:37 am BornIn1142 wrote: It was just a matter of time, I suppose. Lillith's third eye is the clear victor for me. But in general, I just prefer phalluses to yonis. What does that say about me?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 11:38 am Xard wrote: Lilith's Forehead Third Eye/Vagina HANDS DOWN

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:16 pm The GeoFront/Terminal Dogma, duh.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:27 pm The division of Israfel. Am I the only one who noticed this?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:31 pm Rei Makes You Go Splat wrote: The division of Israfel. Am I the only one who noticed this?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:47 pm Rei Makes You Go Splat wrote: The division of Israfel.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Mar 26, 2011 12:50 pm Giant Forehead Vagina. No contest.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Sat Mar 26, 2011 1:13 pm i thought that was just a vagina on lilth's head and not a third eye

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 26, 2011 1:14 pm juaxoo wrote: i thought that was just a vagina on lilth's head and not a third eye

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 26, 2011 1:58 pm Definitely the vagina forehead... unless Robot-fanatic Reichu has something bigger than this.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sat Mar 26, 2011 2:09 pm I'd say Lilith's vaginal forehead too, but for the sake of bringing something new to the plate, I'm gonna say "Volcano" instead. I'm pretty sure I've seen it mentioned in this context before on these very boards. Also, Unit-01 core(?) fusing with Lance of Longinus bears mentioning too.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 26, 2011 2:11 pm BiQ wrote: Also, Unit-01 core(?) fusing with Lance of Longinus bears mentioning too.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Sat Mar 26, 2011 4:12 pm Reference? Eh? How is this just a "reference"? Damn thing has a clit and everything. Even TDSA would recognize that as a beaver I'd say my favorite reference is Shinji, seeing as he's basically a walking vagina. Or maybe that odd shot of NERV's HQ where it vaguely looks like a vagina. I don't remember from what episode it was but I do remember it being mentioned on EGF before. (not that this is an absolute one, but it's actually a bit funny once you think of it that way)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 26, 2011 4:35 pm The geofront as a whole fits very well with the 'hidden garden' strain of vulva euphamisms. It is after all a hidden chamber containing the seed of life as we know it, which must be protected because if the angels reach it, we're fucked. Or Nerv HQ, for that matter. Notice the great big open pool of water with just the tiny little nub of pyramid sticking out at one corner?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 26, 2011 4:49 pm Kendrix mentioning nuclelingus in the phallus thread reminded me of this. Too bad the double ridges on the bottom aren't more prominent. But, damn, that HOOD! Don't you just want to rub it? NemZ wrote: Or Nerv HQ, for that matter. Notice the great big open pool of water with just the tiny little nub of pyramid sticking out at one corner?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Mar 26, 2011 4:56 pm I'm going against the flow here and say the Sandbox scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Mar 26, 2011 5:03 pm Shinji. Definitely, Shinji.
